anti_claim: Batch 7 Demo Take Console imports public-safe Swift source bodies for the local capture console, helper bridge, hotkey/audio monitor, host environment, and transcribe payload builder, plus a SwiftPM build witness. It is not an app launch, not screen or microphone capture authority, not operator recording-session export, not model dispatch, not release approval, and not proof that every UI path is covered.
title: Batch 7 Demo Take Console Capsule
